text.tspan: The Firehose Workflow — Zero-Code Raw Data Delivery
Reads from Kinesis, buffers, delivers to S3 — no transformations, no schemas, no code
Lambda reads CSV from S3, converts rows to JSON
Lambda pushes JSON records to Kinesis AQI_Stream
Firehose buffers records (60s / 5MB), auto-partitions by YYYY/MM/DD/HH
Raw JSON delivered to S3 rawingestion/ — identical to Kinesis records
Glue Raw_Crawler discovers schema, registers in aqi_db catalog
Athena queries raw data via Glue Catalog — SQL on S3
